Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class Entry

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.Entry
public class Entry extends Object
Entry - Entry is a single sided ledger booking that serves as the core ledger component; it is sparsely populated based on the entry type and the goal of the entry

    liquidation()
    Used to record the dismantling of a business by an issuer, paying off debts in order of priority and distributing the remaining assets in cash and/or securities to the owners of the securities and details related to the liquidation
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Maturity>
    maturity()
    Used to record he final repayment, usually in cash, by an issuer for the entire issue, or remaining outstanding securities of a specific security on a specified date and details related to the maturity

    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<NameChange>
    nameChange()
    Used to record changes in the name of a security/securities by the issuer which result in surrendering physical securities or the assigning of a new security identifier which result in new securities being issued and details related to the name changes

    originalId()
    The original entry id; stable across reversals and corrections; use for maintaining lineage of entries through multiple corrections/reversals

    originalProcessDate()
    The original entry process date; stable across reversals and corrections; use for maintaining lineage of entries through multiple corrections/reversals

    Used to record payments on interest-bearing securities where the payment is made in additional securities rather than cash and details related to the payment

    redemptionPartial()
    Used when securities are redeemed by the issuer for cash, in part, before their scheduled maturity date and details related to the redemption.

    reversedEntryId()
    The entry_id of the original entry; only populated on entries with a status of "Reversal"
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ReverseStockSplit>
    reverseStockSplit()
    Used to record the exchange of a company's security for the same company's new security at a preset rate and details related to the reverse stock split
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<RightsDistribution>
    rightsDistribution()
    Used to record distributions to common stock holders of a company that grant the option to purchase new or additional securities of the same company during a predetermined time period at a predetermined price and details related to the rights distribution
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<RightsSubscription>
    rightsSubscription()
    Used to record the purchase of new or additional securities and details related to the subscription.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<RoundingAdjustment>
    roundingAdjustment()
    Used to record rounding adjustments when the sum(price x quantity) of all entries for a given activity do not equal the price x quantity of the fully formed activity record
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<SaleOfRights>
    saleOfRights()
    Used to record payments made by the issuer to security holders when the security is subject to redemptions other than full and partial calls (e.g., early CD redemptions) and details related to the sale of rights
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<SettleDate>
    settleDate()
    The date a given entry/ activity will officially settle
    Optional<EntrySide>
    side()
    Denotes whether the trade is a buy or sell
    Optional<EntrySideModifier>
    sideModifier()
    Indicates whether the trade is opening a new position or closing an existing position Should be populated if possible for trades; the side modifier for the trade
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<SpinOff>
    spinOff()
    Used to record a distribution of subsidiary securities to the shareholders of the parent company without a surrender of securities or payment and details related to the spinoff.
    Optional<EntryState>
    state()
    Set to be NEW for BookEntries, other statuses will be assigned via ModifyActivities; the state of the entry
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<StockDividend>
    stockDividend()
    Used to record a dividend paid to shareholders in the form of shares of stock in either the issuing company or in another company and details related to the stock dividend
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<StockSplit>
    stockSplit()
    Used to record the increase in a company's number of outstanding shares of stock without any change in the shareholder's equity or the aggregate market value at the time of the split and details related to the stock split
    Optional<String>
    subtypeCategory()
    String representation of the metadata object containing more information about an entry/activity
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Sweep>
    sweep()
    Used to record sweeps from a cash balance to an alternative asset or vice versa and details related to the sweep
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<TenderOffer>
    tenderOffer()

    toString()

  • Method Details

    • acatsPendingOut

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<AcatsPendingOut> acatsPendingOut()
      Used to record the movement of funds or shares to/ from the pending_acats memo location

    • accountId

      public Optional<String> accountId()
      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; this is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions

    • accountMemo

      public Optional<AccountMemo> accountMemo()
      Indicates the memo location impacted by an entry

    • accountTransfer

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<AccountTransfer> accountTransfer()
      Used to record the movement of funds or shares during the bookkeeping phase of an account transfer and details related to the account transfer

    • accruedInterest

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryAccruedInterest> accruedInterest()
      Indicates that the entry references accrued interest that has been earned but not yet paid between the last interest payment and the date of the trade

    • acquisition

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Acquisition> acquisition()
      Object containing metadata for acquisition events

    • activityDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityDate> activityDate()
      The activity date refers to the specific calendar day on which a financial transaction, such as a trade at an exchange or a deposit at a bank, was executed. This date is specific to the institution where the transaction took place, capturing the exact day on which the institution formally records and effects the transaction

    • activityId

      public Optional<String> activityId()
      Apex-generated unique activity identifier

    • activityTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> activityTime()
      Activity time refers to the precise moment, recorded in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), when a financial transaction is executed as reported to Apex

    • allocation

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Allocation> allocation()
      Object containing metadata for trade allocation

    • assetId

      public Optional<String> assetId()
      An Apex-provided, global identifier created on a per asset bases which provides connectivity across all areas Required, except for currency movements which should instead have a currency_asset_id

    • bondDefault

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<BondDefault> bondDefault()
      Object containing metadata for bond defaults

    • capitalGains

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CapitalGains> capitalGains()
      Used to record a distribution of cash that an issuer has determined will be declared as income financed from capital gains and not ordinary income and details related to the capital gain

    • cashDividend

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CashDividend> cashDividend()
      Used to record the distribution of cash to shareholders, paid by the issuer, usually based upon current earnings and/or accumulated profits as declared by the board of directors and details related to the cash dividend

    • cashInLieu

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CashInLieu> cashInLieu()
      Object containing metadata for cash in lieu

    • commission

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryCommission> commission()
      Indicates that the entry references commission charged by brokers or financial intermediaries for executing financial transactions on behalf of clients

    • conversion

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Conversion> conversion()
      Used to record the conversion of securities (generally convertible bonds or preferred shares) into another form of securities (usually common shares) at a pre-stated price or rate and details related to the conversion

    • corporateActionMemoAdjustment

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CorporateActionMemoAdjustment> corporateActionMemoAdjustment()
      Object containing metadata for memo locations that have been adjusted due to a corporate action

    • credit

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Credit> credit()
      Used to disburse funds into a customer's account, typically for purposes such as refunds, interest payments, or rewards from enrolled programs and details related to the credit

    • currencyAssetId

      public Optional<String> currencyAssetId()
      The asset_id of the currency that all monetary values relate to Required for currency movements

    • delivery

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Delivery> delivery()
      Object containing metadata for delivery events

    • deposit

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Deposit> deposit()
      Used to record deposits of funds into an account and capture details related to the deposit

    • description

      public Optional<String> description()
      A plain text description of the entry; will not be available to search on or build other features off of

    • drip

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Drip> drip()
      Used to record the movement of funds to/ from the pending_drip memo location

    • entryId

      public Optional<String> entryId()
      The unique id of the entry

    • exchange

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Exchange> exchange()
      Used to record the exchange of certificates for a new security or cash and details related to the exchange

    • fee

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryFee> fee()
      Used to record Fees that have been assessed to account and capture details related to the fee

    • flip

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Flip> flip()
      Object containing metadata for a Flip

    • fpsl

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Fpsl> fpsl()
      Used to record the movements of shares to/ from the fpsl memo location and details related to the fpsl memo

    • grossAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryGrossAmount> grossAmount()
      The monetary value of an activity, exclusive of any fees (First money)

    • interest

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Interest> interest()
      Used to record the payment of interest to accounts that have maintained a cash balance or the charging of interest to accounts that have used margin and details related to the interest

    • interestPayment

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<InterestPayment> interestPayment()
      Used to record the The payment of an obligation an issuer has agreed to make to holders of an interest-bearing security and details related to the interest payment. Usually, the payment is made in cash and on a scheduled basis

    • liquidation

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Liquidation> liquidation()
      Used to record the dismantling of a business by an issuer, paying off debts in order of priority and distributing the remaining assets in cash and/or securities to the owners of the securities and details related to the liquidation

    • maturity

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Maturity> maturity()
      Used to record he final repayment, usually in cash, by an issuer for the entire issue, or remaining outstanding securities of a specific security on a specified date and details related to the maturity

    • merger

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Merger> merger()
      Used to record the exchange of one company's security for another company's security, cash, or a combination of cash and securities and details related to the merger

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      accounts/{account_id}/entries/{entry_id}

    • nameChange

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<NameChange> nameChange()
      Used to record changes in the name of a security/securities by the issuer which result in surrendering physical securities or the assigning of a new security identifier which result in new securities being issued and details related to the name changes

    • originalId

      public Optional<String> originalId()
      The original entry id; stable across reversals and corrections; use for maintaining lineage of entries through multiple corrections/reversals

    • originalProcessDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OriginalProcessDate> originalProcessDate()
      The original entry process date; stable across reversals and corrections; use for maintaining lineage of entries through multiple corrections/reversals

    • paymentInKind

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PaymentInKind> paymentInKind()
      Used to record payments on interest-bearing securities where the payment is made in additional securities rather than cash and details related to the payment

    • price

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryPrice> price()
      The monetary value paid for a given security in a trade Required, except for currency movements

    • processDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryProcessDate> processDate()
      The date that the entry was booked on

    • quantity

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryQuantity> quantity()
      The quantity of shares bought, sold, or moved. For entries/ activities involving Fixed Income assets, quantity is expressed as par value Required for trades and memos, optional for movements.

    • receive

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Receive> receive()
      Object containing metadata for receive events

    • redemptionFull

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<RedemptionFull> redemptionFull()
      Used to record the redemption of a security for cash in its entirety for which the holders receive the principal amount of the security and details related to the redemption

    • redemptionPartial

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<RedemptionPartial> redemptionPartial()
      Used when securities are redeemed by the issuer for cash, in part, before their scheduled maturity date and details related to the redemption. The outstanding amount of securities will be proportionally reduced based on a specific percentage of holding

    • reverseStockSplit

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ReverseStockSplit> reverseStockSplit()
      Used to record the exchange of a company's security for the same company's new security at a preset rate and details related to the reverse stock split

    • reversedEntryId

      public Optional<String> reversedEntryId()
      The entry_id of the original entry; only populated on entries with a status of "Reversal"

    • rightsDistribution

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<RightsDistribution> rightsDistribution()
      Used to record distributions to common stock holders of a company that grant the option to purchase new or additional securities of the same company during a predetermined time period at a predetermined price and details related to the rights distribution

    • rightsSubscription

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<RightsSubscription> rightsSubscription()
      Used to record the purchase of new or additional securities and details related to the subscription. Rights are often tradable in a secondary market

    • roundingAdjustment

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<RoundingAdjustment> roundingAdjustment()
      Used to record rounding adjustments when the sum(price x quantity) of all entries for a given activity do not equal the price x quantity of the fully formed activity record

    • saleOfRights

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<SaleOfRights> saleOfRights()
      Used to record payments made by the issuer to security holders when the security is subject to redemptions other than full and partial calls (e.g., early CD redemptions) and details related to the sale of rights

    • settleDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<SettleDate> settleDate()
      The date a given entry/ activity will officially settle

    • side

      public Optional<EntrySide> side()
      Denotes whether the trade is a buy or sell

    • sideModifier

      public Optional<EntrySideModifier> sideModifier()
      Indicates whether the trade is opening a new position or closing an existing position Should be populated if possible for trades; the side modifier for the trade

    • spinOff

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<SpinOff> spinOff()
      Used to record a distribution of subsidiary securities to the shareholders of the parent company without a surrender of securities or payment and details related to the spinoff. A spin-off represents a form of divestiture resulting in an independent company

    • state

      public Optional<EntryState> state()
      Set to be NEW for BookEntries, other statuses will be assigned via ModifyActivities; the state of the entry

    • stockDividend

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<StockDividend> stockDividend()
      Used to record a dividend paid to shareholders in the form of shares of stock in either the issuing company or in another company and details related to the stock dividend

    • stockSplit

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<StockSplit> stockSplit()
      Used to record the increase in a company's number of outstanding shares of stock without any change in the shareholder's equity or the aggregate market value at the time of the split and details related to the stock split

    • subtypeCategory

      public Optional<String> subtypeCategory()
      String representation of the metadata object containing more information about an entry/activity

    • sweep

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Sweep> sweep()
      Used to record sweeps from a cash balance to an alternative asset or vice versa and details related to the sweep

    • tenderOffer

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<TenderOffer> tenderOffer()
      Used to record the sale of securities for a specified price due to an offer from the issuer or a third party and details related to the tender offer

    • trade

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryTrade> trade()
      Used to record the the execution of a buy or sell transaction resulting in the transfer of securities and corresponding payment and details related to the trade

    • transfer

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryTransfer> transfer()
      Used to record more generic transfers of funds or securities and details related to the transfer. The transfer type and activity_description can be used to provide more specific context

    • type

      public Optional<EntryType> type()
      The Type of the entry; determines the set of mandatory fields as well as informing downstream processes how to handle this record

    • unitSplit

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<UnitSplit> unitSplit()
      Used to record increases in the number of units outstanding through the issuing of more units to current shareholders and details related to the unit split

    • warrantExercise

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<WarrantExercise> warrantExercise()
      Used to record the exchange of warrants for shares and details related to the warrant exercise. The exercise will commonly require a payment based upon a pre-determined value and time and details related to the warrant exercise

    • withdrawal

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Withdrawal> withdrawal()
      Used to record withdrawals of funds from an account and capture details related to the withdrawal

    • withdrawalPendingReview

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<WithdrawalPendingReview> withdrawalPendingReview()
      Used to record the movement of funds to/ from the pending_withdrawal memo location

    • withholding

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryWithholding> withholding()
      Used to record tax withholdings and details related to the withholding

    • worthless

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<Worthless> worthless()
      Used to record the removal of positions in a given security when the DTC has received formal notice that the security is worthless and details related to the worthless event

      public static final Entry.Builder builder()

      public Entry withAcatsPendingOut(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AcatsPendingOut> acatsPendingOut)
      Used to record the movement of funds or shares to/ from the pending_acats memo location

      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; this is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions

      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; this is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions

    • withAccruedInterest

      public Entry withAccruedInterest(EntryAccruedInterest accruedInterest)
      Indicates that the entry references accrued interest that has been earned but not yet paid between the last interest payment and the date of the trade

    • withAccruedInterest

      public Entry withAccruedInterest(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EntryAccruedInterest> accruedInterest)
      Indicates that the entry references accrued interest that has been earned but not yet paid between the last interest payment and the date of the trade

    • withAcquisition

      public Entry withAcquisition(Acquisition acquisition)

    • withAcquisition

      public Entry withAcquisition(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Acquisition> acquisition)
      Object containing metadata for acquisition events

    • withActivityDate

      public Entry withActivityDate(ActivityDate activityDate)
      The activity date refers to the specific calendar day on which a financial transaction, such as a trade at an exchange or a deposit at a bank, was executed. This date is specific to the institution where the transaction took place, capturing the exact day on which the institution formally records and effects the transaction

    • withActivityDate

      public Entry withActivityDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityDate> activityDate)
      The activity date refers to the specific calendar day on which a financial transaction, such as a trade at an exchange or a deposit at a bank, was executed. This date is specific to the institution where the transaction took place, capturing the exact day on which the institution formally records and effects the transaction

      Apex-generated unique activity identifier

    • withActivityId

      public Entry withActivityId(Optional<String> activityId)
      Apex-generated unique activity identifier

    • withActivityTime

      public Entry withActivityTime(OffsetDateTime activityTime)
      Activity time refers to the precise moment, recorded in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), when a financial transaction is executed as reported to Apex

      public Entry withActivityTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> activityTime)
      Activity time refers to the precise moment, recorded in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), when a financial transaction is executed as reported to Apex

      public Entry withRightsDistribution(RightsDistribution rightsDistribution)
      Used to record distributions to common stock holders of a company that grant the option to purchase new or additional securities of the same company during a predetermined time period at a predetermined price and details related to the rights distribution

    • withRightsDistribution

      public Entry withRightsDistribution(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RightsDistribution> rightsDistribution)
      Used to record distributions to common stock holders of a company that grant the option to purchase new or additional securities of the same company during a predetermined time period at a predetermined price and details related to the rights distribution

    • withRightsSubscription

      public Entry withRightsSubscription(RightsSubscription rightsSubscription)
      Used to record the purchase of new or additional securities and details related to the subscription. Rights are often tradable in a secondary market

    • withRightsSubscription

      public Entry withRightsSubscription(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RightsSubscription> rightsSubscription)
      Used to record the purchase of new or additional securities and details related to the subscription. Rights are often tradable in a secondary market

    • withRoundingAdjustment

      public Entry withRoundingAdjustment(RoundingAdjustment roundingAdjustment)
      Used to record rounding adjustments when the sum(price x quantity) of all entries for a given activity do not equal the price x quantity of the fully formed activity record

    • withRoundingAdjustment

      public Entry withRoundingAdjustment(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RoundingAdjustment> roundingAdjustment)
      Used to record rounding adjustments when the sum(price x quantity) of all entries for a given activity do not equal the price x quantity of the fully formed activity record

    • withSaleOfRights

      public Entry withSaleOfRights(SaleOfRights saleOfRights)
      Used to record payments made by the issuer to security holders when the security is subject to redemptions other than full and partial calls (e.g., early CD redemptions) and details related to the sale of rights

    • withSaleOfRights

      public Entry withSaleOfRights(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends SaleOfRights> saleOfRights)
      Used to record payments made by the issuer to security holders when the security is subject to redemptions other than full and partial calls (e.g., early CD redemptions) and details related to the sale of rights

      The date a given entry/ activity will officially settle

      The date a given entry/ activity will officially settle

    • withSide

      public Entry withSide(EntrySide side)
      Denotes whether the trade is a buy or sell

    • withSide

      public Entry withSide(Optional<? extends EntrySide> side)
      Denotes whether the trade is a buy or sell

    • withSideModifier

      public Entry withSideModifier(EntrySideModifier sideModifier)
      Indicates whether the trade is opening a new position or closing an existing position Should be populated if possible for trades; the side modifier for the trade

    • withSideModifier

      public Entry withSideModifier(Optional<? extends EntrySideModifier> sideModifier)
      Indicates whether the trade is opening a new position or closing an existing position Should be populated if possible for trades; the side modifier for the trade

    • withSpinOff

      public Entry withSpinOff(SpinOff spinOff)
      Used to record a distribution of subsidiary securities to the shareholders of the parent company without a surrender of securities or payment and details related to the spinoff. A spin-off represents a form of divestiture resulting in an independent company

    • withSpinOff

      public Entry withSpinOff(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends SpinOff> spinOff)
      Used to record a distribution of subsidiary securities to the shareholders of the parent company without a surrender of securities or payment and details related to the spinoff. A spin-off represents a form of divestiture resulting in an independent company

    • withState

      public Entry withState(EntryState state)
      Set to be NEW for BookEntries, other statuses will be assigned via ModifyActivities; the state of the entry

    • withState

      public Entry withState(Optional<? extends EntryState> state)
      Set to be NEW for BookEntries, other statuses will be assigned via ModifyActivities; the state of the entry

    • withStockDividend

      public Entry withStockDividend(StockDividend stockDividend)
      Used to record a dividend paid to shareholders in the form of shares of stock in either the issuing company or in another company and details related to the stock dividend

    • withStockDividend

      public Entry withStockDividend(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends StockDividend> stockDividend)
      Used to record a dividend paid to shareholders in the form of shares of stock in either the issuing company or in another company and details related to the stock dividend

    • withStockSplit

      public Entry withStockSplit(StockSplit stockSplit)
      Used to record the increase in a company's number of outstanding shares of stock without any change in the shareholder's equity or the aggregate market value at the time of the split and details related to the stock split

    • withStockSplit

      public Entry withStockSplit(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends StockSplit> stockSplit)
      Used to record the increase in a company's number of outstanding shares of stock without any change in the shareholder's equity or the aggregate market value at the time of the split and details related to the stock split

      public Entry withTrade(EntryTrade trade)
      Used to record the the execution of a buy or sell transaction resulting in the transfer of securities and corresponding payment and details related to the trade

      public Entry withTrade(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EntryTrade> trade)
      Used to record the the execution of a buy or sell transaction resulting in the transfer of securities and corresponding payment and details related to the trade

    • withTransfer

      public Entry withTransfer(EntryTransfer transfer)
      Used to record more generic transfers of funds or securities and details related to the transfer. The transfer type and activity_description can be used to provide more specific context

      public Entry withTransfer(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EntryTransfer> transfer)
      Used to record more generic transfers of funds or securities and details related to the transfer. The transfer type and activity_description can be used to provide more specific context

      public Entry withType(EntryType type)
      The Type of the entry; determines the set of mandatory fields as well as informing downstream processes how to handle this record

    • withType

      public Entry withType(Optional<? extends EntryType> type)
      The Type of the entry; determines the set of mandatory fields as well as informing downstream processes how to handle this record

      Used to record increases in the number of units outstanding through the issuing of more units to current shareholders and details related to the unit split

    • withWarrantExercise

      public Entry withWarrantExercise(WarrantExercise warrantExercise)
      Used to record the exchange of warrants for shares and details related to the warrant exercise. The exercise will commonly require a payment based upon a pre-determined value and time and details related to the warrant exercise

    • withWarrantExercise

      public Entry withWarrantExercise(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends WarrantExercise> warrantExercise)
